title: Decision 4 — no pool-aware substitution, no Claude Code CLI / Max OAuth
summary: Decision to skip homestead-ts ADR-0011 pool-snapshot substitution and ADR-0014 pluggable Claude Code CLI runtime; v0 uses nanoclaw's default Claude Agent SDK + OneCLI vault path.
notes: No explicit Status: Accepted frontmatter, but document is in decisions/ directory with definitive 'will NOT build' and 'when to revisit' sections; project CLAUDE.md treats decisions/ as load-bearing decision records. Treated as locked Accepted ADR.
